name: agent-handoff
description: Hand work between CLI agents (cursor, codex, claude) with topic-pinned session continuity.

scripts.release:check: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run test:node && bun run runtime:check
scripts.test:node: bun scripts/build-node.ts && node runtime/cli.js help >/dev/null && node runtime/cli.js status >/dev/null && node runtime/cli.js alias --suggest >/dev/null && echo 'node smoke ok'
